content.text:
Looking at the image, the car is on the gravel/grass area to the left of the asphalt track, with the road visible to the right — the car needs to steer right to return to the track.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 117, target = (117 + 5) % 121 = 122 % 121 = 1
- Target WP index 1: x=3.2095, y=0.6831
- Car: x=2.8771, y=0.9773, heading=4.078°
- dy = 0.6831 - 0.9773 = -0.2942
- dx = 3.2095 - 2.8771 = 0.3324
- bearing = atan2(-0.2942, 0.3324) = -41.49°
- delta = -41.49° - 4.078° = -45.57°
- Waypoint is to the RIGHT → negative steering

Delta = -45.57°, still a large right correction needed. Car remains on gravel (y=0.977 vs centerline y=0.683), distance_from_center=0.294m. Continue maximum right steering.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is still on gravel left of track (y=0.977 vs centerline y=0.683, dist=0.294m) with delta=-45.57° to target waypoint, requiring continued maximum right steering to return to asphalt.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn (CCW), negative = right turn (CW)",
    "Track centerline y~0.683 on this straight section; car y~0.977 means car is far left of center",
    "Car has been persistently left of center (y: 0.995→0.990→0.977) — very slow correction at 0.75 speed",
    "When delta > 40°, use speed=0.75 and steering=-25 for maximum correction",
    "Track runs nearly due east for next ~20 waypoints (y stays ~0.68)",
    "Once delta < 5°, switch to 0 steering to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width 0.76m — very narrow, precision required",
    "Progress 98.97% — nearly complete lap, stay on track at all costs",
    "Car is on gravel/grass edge — need maximum right correction now",
    "Heading ~4° but need bearing ~-41° — large negative delta persists despite -25° steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.772, 2.822, 2.877],
    "y": [0.995, 0.990, 0.977],
    "yaw": [10.41, 7.54, 4.08]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP1 at (3.210, 0.683): dy=-0.294, dx=0.332, bearing=-41.49°, delta=-45.57° → sharp right correction needed",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
